parsed.clarification_question: By 'make this stronger', do you mean to strengthen the conceptual framing and novelty of the research, or to polish the writing and structure of the text?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to 'make this stronger' is projected as load-bearing for conceptual reconstruction to reframe the thesis, gap, and contribution for a more compelling research narrative.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is central to strengthening the artifact by estimating and emphasizing the delta against prior work.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a cross-cutting dimension but not requested in the delegation to make the text stronger.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is always active but assigned weight 0.0 as it is not part of the explicit request.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is not specified in the vague delegation, resulting in weight 0.0.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is included in the active set but not requested, hence weight 0.0.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is not mentioned or implied in the delegation.
